name: Shaving Cream
description: A traditional, rich, creamy shaving lather. Produces a protective barrier over the skin, preventing razor burn, nicks, and ingrown hairs. Scented with a traditionally masculine fragrance. Ideal for very sensitive skin.
howToUse: Lather in palms or use with a brush, then apply directly to face.
ingredients: Aqua, Stearic Acid, Myristic Acid, Potassium Hydroxide, Coconut Acid, Glycerin, Triethanolamine, Parfum, Sodium Hydroxide, Methylchloroisothiazolinone, Methylisothiazolinone.
